NAIL ART & SERVICES

Explore my Services

Prices may not be acurate, DM me for exact pricing and availability, these are estimates.

Detailed Nail Art

Detailed nail art including intricate drawings, charaqcters, album covers, and 3D designs. Pricing varies based on complexity.

Approximately $80+

Acrylic

Long-lasting acrylic nails start at $40. Designs and nail art are priced additionally.

Starts at $40

Acrylic Fills

Refill your acrylic nails with a fresh coat. Acrylic fills start at $25. Designs and nail art are priced additionally.

Starts at $25

Removals

Professional removal of acrylic or gel nails.

Starts at $10 & Forgin removals will be $15

French Tips

Classic French tips with a polished finish. Will be same price any length and shape. Additional designs are priced additionally.

Starts at $60

Manicures

A classic Manicure including nail shaping, cuticle care, your choice of clear topcoat or Gel polish. Designs are available as an additional option can be priced additionally.

Starts at $15

Rubber base

Recommended for strong and healthy nails. This service is an enhancement of the natural nail. Length can not be added. Nail art and designs are priced additionally.

Starts at $25

Acrygel

Acrygel nails start at $35. Designs and nail art are priced additionally.

Starts at $35

DM me on Instagram to book your appointment or ask any questions you may have!
